message:
test(core): fill coverage gaps in transition, cancel, outcome, and budget tests (bd-hwb.1)

Add 13 new tests for transition.h (state string functions, out-of-range
bounds, terminal predicates), 2 for cancel (severity clamping, left-bias
on equal timestamp), plus previously staged algebraic property tests for
outcome (associativity, commutativity, dominance, idempotency) and
budget (associativity, idempotency, boundary conditions).

Total test count: 96 unit + 11 invariant = 107 tests, all passing on
gcc 15 and clang 20 with -Werror.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
